proposals.title: File duplication in code generation output
proposals.lesson: Code generation produced duplicate files: The generated implementation has sound architecture but is operationally broken due to 26 duplicate files creating type conflicts. This refactoring co. Extraction pipeline needs deduplication.
proposals.reason: Recurring failure patterns should be captured to prevent repetition in future projects.

proposals.title: SwiftUI lifecycle pattern: Missing MainActor Annotation
proposals.lesson: Generated SwiftUI code missing lifecycle management: Missing MainActor Annotation
proposals.reason: Technical patterns detected in reviews can be reused across projects.
